---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement for Airlock
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What user-visible problem does this solve? Concrete scenario preferred over an abstract wish.

**Proposed solution**
The minimum change you can imagine that solves the problem.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them.

**Out of scope / non-goals**
What you specifically do *not* want this to do.
